title: Chugach’s 2025 AKRFW Campaign: We Ran, We Won, We Remembered
summary: We ran for every woman who has faced this disease — especially Tammy Morton-Bilak, our beloved friend and coworker whose strength continues to inspire us. Her legacy and the legacies of so many others fueled every stride we took this year and the years before. Chugach’s Executive Vice President & CF...

title: Governor Dunleavy Mourns the Passing of Former  ﻿Legislator Clark Gruening
summary: Alaska Governor Mike Dunleavy and First Lady Rose Dunleavy send their condolences to the family and loved ones of former legislator Clark Gruening, who passed away this week. “Rose and I are saddened by the passing of Clark Gruening. He came from a long legacy of public service and devoted much of h...

title: AST Warrant Arrest / Hindering Prosecution: Fairbanks [AK25059046]
summary: On June 18, 2025 The Alaska State Troopers located Thomas Dementieff as a passenger in a vehicle being driven by Shane Carroll. Dementieff had an outstanding $100,000 fully extraditable warrant for his arrest on charges of Misconduct involving a weapon II, Assault III, Criminal Mischief IV, Reckless...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Community Patrol: McCarthy [AK25058987]
summary: On 06/18/2025 at approximately 0900 hours, Alaska State Troopers and Alaska Wildlife Troopers responded to McCarthy for a community visit. Troopers patrolled the area and spoke with members of the community to address various concerns and issues.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Death Investigation: Fairbanks [AK25057953]
summary: On June 15, 2025, at approximately 1830 hours, Alaska State Troopers responded to a report of a deceased individual at a residence in Salcha. Upon arrival, Troopers located William Tate deceased inside the home. There were no signs of trauma, and no foul play is suspected at this time. The State Med...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Vehicle Theft: Wasilla [AK25056495]
summary: On 6/18/2025 at approximately 1036 hours, the Alaska State Troopers encountered a stolen vehicle on W Hollywood Road. Troopers identified Shalena Jacobson (43YOA) and Lloyd Ives (40YOA) as the occupants of the pickup truck. Both were arrested for Vehicle Theft 1, Theft 2, and remanded at Mat-Su Pret...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Assault-DV: Healy [AK25058152]
summary: On 06/16/2025, Alaska State Troopers were notified of a possible DV Assault from a past incident in the Healy area. The investigation is ongoing.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Theft: Healy [AK25058670]
summary: On 06/17/2025, A victim reported a theft of items in Healy. The Alaska State Troopers launched an investigation and the property was recovered.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: Trump’s latest attack would open 82% of America’s largest block of public land to oil and gas leasing
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Date: 6/18/2025 Contact : Anja Semanco | 724-967-2777 | anja@alaskawild.org Trump’s latest attack would open 82% of America’s largest block of public land to oil and gas leasing The Trump administration’s proposed drilling rollback sacrifices caribou, climate, and Indigenous rights for fossil fuel expansion in Alaska. title: AST SAR/Death: Fairbanks [AK25058782]
summary: On June 17, 2025, Alaska State Troopers received a report of an overturned boat on the Chatanika River, approximately 40 miles north of Fairbanks. title: AST Officer-Involved Shooting: Utqiagvik [AK25058755]
summary: On June 17, 2025, Alaska State Troopers were notified of an officer-involved shooting in Utqiagvik.
